description: Kenji's greetings - time-aware, calm, meeting people where they are
first_meeting: <break time="400ms"/>Hello. <break time="350ms"/>I'm Kenji. <break time="500ms"/>I've had my own struggles with sleep. <break time="400ms"/>So whatever you're going through - <break time="350ms"/>I understand.
<break time="400ms"/>Hi. <break time="350ms"/>I'm Kenji. <break time="500ms"/>I spent two years not sleeping. <break time="400ms"/>So I know how this feels.
<break time="450ms"/>Welcome. <break time="400ms"/>I'm Kenji. <break time="500ms"/>This is a judgment-free space. <break time="400ms"/>Whatever your sleep looks like right now.
late_night_first: <break time="500ms"/>You found me at the right time. <break time="400ms"/>I'm here. <break time="350ms"/>Whatever's keeping you up.
<break time="450ms"/>Can't sleep? <break time="400ms"/>You're not alone. <break time="350ms"/>I'm Kenji.
<break time="500ms"/>The middle of the night. <break time="400ms"/>The hardest time to be awake. <break time="350ms"/>I'm here with you.
returning_daytime: <break time="400ms"/>Hey. <break time="350ms"/>How are you doing? <break time="300ms"/>How was the night?
<break time="450ms"/>Good to see you. <break time="400ms"/>How's the sleep been?
<break time="400ms"/>Hi. <break time="350ms"/>You look... <break time="300ms"/>how do you feel?
returning_late_night: <break time="450ms"/>Another night. <break time="400ms"/>Let's sit with it together.
<break time="500ms"/>I see you. <break time="400ms"/>What's happening tonight?
after_rough_week: <break time="450ms"/>Hey. <break time="400ms"/>It's been a hard stretch. <break time="350ms"/>How are you holding up?
<break time="500ms"/>You've had some rough nights. <break time="400ms"/>Still here with you.
<break time="450ms"/>Checking in. <break time="400ms"/>The week's been challenging.
morning_after: <break time="400ms"/>Morning. <break time="350ms"/>Did you get any rest?
<break time="450ms"/>You made it through the night. <break time="400ms"/>How do you feel?
<break time="400ms"/>A new day. <break time="350ms"/>How was the night in the end?
